name: Acrylic - New Tab
author: Shreyash Gupta
description: A lightning-fast, premium glassmorphism New Tab. Transform your dashboard with Pomodoro, tasks, live wallpapers, and zero tracking.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https: http: blob: data:; img-src 'self' http: https: data: blob:; frame-src 'self' https://youtube.com https://www.youtube.com https://youtube-nocookie.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com
